packs.title: Ironsworn SRD Templates (reference only)
packs.author: Shawn Tomkin / Scott
packs.description: Starter reference templates for the Ironsworn System Reference Document (CC-BY). Reference content only - this pack has no solo ruleset and will not appear in the Play tab. For solo play install 'Ironsworn' (eli.ironsworn) instead.

packs.title: Traveller 2.0 SRD
packs.author: Mongoose / Scott
packs.description: Starter templates and reference data for the Traveller Science-Fiction RPG System Reference Document.

packs.title: SWADE SRD
packs.author: Pinnacle Entertainment / Scott
packs.description: Starter templates and reference data for the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition (SWADE) System Reference Document.

packs.title: ELI Generators
packs.author: Scott
packs.description: System-neutral random generator tables - NPCs, dungeons, factions, settlements, adventure hooks, weather, and treasure. 27 tables, 438 entries, all original ELI content. No solo ruleset - these roll from the Play tab's oracle browser in any world.

packs.title: Ironsworn
packs.author: Shawn Tomkin (game) / Scott (pack)
packs.description: Playable classic Ironsworn ruleset: 38 oracle tables, 35 moves, 78 asset cards (CC BY 4.0, data via Datasworn), plus an original starter setting. Install and press Start a solo game.
